big_problem: Three Bureau tabs still hide behind HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS while APIs return live league rows.
epic: League L5 — Unhide remaining Bureau tabs with screenshot-ready renderers
slice_title: Schedule tab unhidden with SOS matchup renderer
parity_ref: League L5 — hidden Bureau renderers or watermarked export
acceptance_ref: FACTORY-DOD Gate C (in-product renderer; no OG this atom)
acceptance_commands: grep -q 'HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS = new Set' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts && ! grep -q 'strength-of-schedule' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts | head -1; test $(grep -c 'strength-of-schedule' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts) -gt 0
